name: Washington Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix crumbs, sugar, and butter spread; press onto bottom of 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake crust for 10 minutes.
4. Increase oven temperature to 450°F.
5. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended with an electric mixer.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Blend in milk and vanilla; pour over the crust.
8. Bake for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F.
9. Continue baking for 30-35 minutes or until set. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing it.
10. Refrigerate.
